notes: Nâng văn phong tiếng Anh bản PDF lên chuẩn ship-management/tài chính. Báo cáo EN: 'Statement of Account — Disbursements & Collections', 'Balance brought/carried forward', 'Funds received / advances from Owners', 'Disbursements on Owners account', 'Particulars', 'Settled/Outstanding', 'For and on behalf of the Owners/Managers'. Commercial Invoice: diễn giải 'disbursements incurred on the Owners account', 'as per management agreement', điều khoản thanh toán T/T trong 15 ngày, all bank charges for remitter, USD; tiêu đề phụ 'In respect of disbursements on Owners account and management fee'. Kế thừa 3.01.75.
